query:
ALTER TABLE paperPositions 
  ADD COLUMN peakPrice DOUBLE DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN wideLungActive INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN wideLungActivatedAt TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN finalOrderMode INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN topUpCount INT DEFAULT 0;
